primary.title: PDF Tool Suite - Merge, Split and Compress PDFs Offline
primary.description: Perform essential PDF utilities locally in your web browser. Merge multiple documents, split or extract specific page ranges, and compress PDF file sizes securely.
primary.heading: PDF Tool Suite (Merge, Split, Compress)
primary.seo_content:
Our PDF Tool Suite provides three essential document operations that run 100% locally on your computer. Standard online tools require uploading your sensitive files to external servers, creating privacy vulnerabilities. By processing everything client-side in your web browser, your data remains completely private and secure.

  • 1. Merge PDF Documents

    Combine unlimited PDF files, arrange their order, and export a consolidated document in seconds.

  • 2. Split & Extract PDF Pages

    Extract specific pages or page ranges (e.g. 1-3, 5, 8-10) into a new, separate PDF file instantly.

  • 3. Compress & Optimize PDF Size

    Reconstruct streams and strip obsolete metadata from PDF files to shrink their storage size without losing visual quality.

examples.title: Extract specific pages from a report
examples.description: Upload a 10-page document, enter '2-4, 7' in the page range selector, and download a new PDF containing only those pages.

examples.title: Compress a bloated document before emailing
examples.description: Upload your file to the compression tool, select High Optimization, and download an optimized version with up to 50% smaller file size.

faqs.question: How does the PDF compressor work offline?
faqs.answer: It loads the PDF, strips redundant font mappings, cleans up edit metadata histories, and saves the binary using compressed object streams client-side, reducing size without degrading image resolution.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on pages I can split?
faqs.answer: No. You can split any page range up to the total number of pages in the document. The split is performed instantly.

faqs.question: Are files saved or sent?
faqs.answer: No files are sent to any server. Your PDFs are read, modified, and saved directly within your browser's local sandbox.

merge-pdf-files.title: Merge PDF Files - Combine PDFs offline in Browser
merge-pdf-files.description: Securely merge PDF files on your computer. Offline browser merging tool. No sign-ups required.
merge-pdf-files.heading: Merge PDF Files
merge-pdf-files.seo_content: Merge PDF Files locally in your browser. Rearrange files, import multiple scans, and merge them without server uploads.

examples.title: Join tax documents
examples.description: Upload your form files and combine them for easy submission.

faqs.question: Does this support password-protected PDFs?
faqs.answer: No, encrypted or password-protected PDF files must be decrypted before they can be merged by this client-side library.

pdf-joiner.title: PDF Joiner - Join Multiple PDF Pages Locally
pdf-joiner.description: Join PDF pages and documents together. Easy drag-and-drop secure offline PDF union tool.
pdf-joiner.heading: PDF Joiner
pdf-joiner.seo_content: The PDF Joiner provides a simple drag-and-drop workflow to drop files, inspect the order, remove selected items, and download the joined PDF document instantly.

examples.title: Consolidate scanning outputs
examples.description: Join separately scanned pages into a single document.

faqs.question: Which browsers are supported?
faqs.answer: Any modern web browser supporting standard File APIs and canvas operations, including Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Apple Safari, and Microsoft Edge.
